title: Preparation and Properties of Hydrogen Peroxide

concepts.title: Preparation of H2O2
concepts.conceptBody:
Hydrogen Peroxide

Although the preparation of hydrogen peroxide given in NCERT book is sufficient for JEE, but here we are covering only one preparation.

  • ${{\text{H}}_{2}}{{\text{O}}_{2}}$ is unstable and hence it disproportionate depending on the temperature and concentration.

examples.title: The oxide that gives hydrogen peroxide $\left(\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}_2\right)$ on the treatment with a dilute acid $\left(\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{SO}_4\right)$ is
$\mathrm{HCl}$ is added to the following oxides which one would give $\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}_2$
